description:
The pattern drain-pending → register-new-specs → walk-bodies appears four times in type_module_pass (lines 572-598, 600-626, 682-707, 712-760). Each copy is structurally identical: drain keys from pending, call type_fn if the key is new in specs, then walk the newly-registered spec's body via walk_spec_for_discovery.

Extract into:
  fn drain_and_register(
      pending: &mut Pending,
      specs: &mut Specs,
      idx_of: &IdxOf,
      m: &Module,
      callsite_fn_consts: &mut FnConsts,
      prev_returns: &Returns,
      caller_scc: &SccSet,
      widen_now: bool,
  ) -> Vec<(FnId, Vec<Descr>)>  // newly-registered keys this call

Three of the four duplicated blocks are removed. The fourth (inside the SCC loop) stays distinct because it has SCC-specific widening logic.

No behavior change. Returns newly-registered keys — this return value is the hook W2 uses to build the worklist.

Requires fz-afs.5 (S1) for the idx_of parameter.
title: extract drain/register/walk into helper; remove 3 duplicated copies
